since_last: 37% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.12%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.52% · BTC -2.21% · Gold -2.20% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 37% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.12%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.12%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.13%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.06%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.06%, ANET +6.11%, AVGO +5.80%, BIDU +4.88%, AMBA +3.76%. Laggards: UPST -5.14%, PANW -4.63%, RXRX -4.17%, CRNC -3.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.18% at $149.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.18% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
